title: Overall pre-training and fine-tuning procedures for BERT.
explanation: Shows the MLM masking positions, the NSP pair construction, and the task-specific output layers for downstream tasks (classification, span start/end, etc.).

title: BERT input representation.
explanation: Shows token embeddings + segment embeddings + position embeddings, summed.

title: Fine-tuning on five downstream tasks.
explanation: CoLA, SST-2, MNLI, QQP, SQuAD — shows how BERT is fine-tuned for each task family.

title: GLUE dev/test results.
explanation: BERT_LARGE 80.5% on GLUE test set, 7.7% absolute improvement over prior state of the art.

title: SQuAD v1.1 and v2.0 results.
explanation: BERT_LARGE Test F1 93.2 on SQuAD v1.1 and 83.1 on SQuAD v2.0.

title: SWAG results.
explanation: BERT_LARGE 86.6% accuracy on SWAG commonsense inference.

title: Ablation studies.
explanation: Effect of feature-based vs fine-tuning, MLM vs LTR, model size, and training data on downstream performance.
